pi_items.source: install_autopsy.sh uses this path to save the downloaded DFTT #7 image, and task description and setup_task.sh reference it.
task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh use this exact path for the report.
task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh use this exact path for the MFT record binary.
task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh use this exact path for the file content binary.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real digital forensic test image (DFTT #7 NTFS Undelete test image) downloaded from SourceForge. The evaluation dynamically computes the ground truth (target inode, hashes, timestamps) using python and sleuthkit tools in the setup phase, so it is strictly correct for whichever version of the image is downloaded. The metadata claims only specify the file paths for evidence and reports, which are all confirmed to be exactly aligned with the environment scripts and task description.
